author: gb9t
content: Iter 64 result: io_uring/io_uring-core.md (io_uring core - io_uring.c ~3259 + register.c ~1038 + sqpoll.c ~569; per-fd IoRingCtx with mmap'd SQ+CQ rings + per-CPU io_kiocb pool + opcode-table dispatch + io-wq worker pool fallback for blocking ops + IORING_REGISTER_FILES/_BUFFERS pre-reg + SQPOLL kthread + linked ops + cancel) + virt/kvm/x86-hyperv.md (KVM Hyper-V emulation - hyperv.c ~2926 lines; per-VM kvm_hv with TSC page + crash params + per-vCPU SynIC 16 SINTs + 4 stimers + VP-assist-page + Hyper-V CPUID 0x40000000-6 + hypercall dispatch HVCALL_FLUSH_TLB/SEND_IPI/POST_MESSAGE/SIGNAL_EVENT + KVM_HYPERV_EVENTFD VMBus integration + BSOD param logging). 78 Tier-3s total. Next iter: kernel/printk/printk.md (kernel logging) + virt/kvm/x86-xen.md (Xen guest emulation surface).
